name: ABDUCTED! An Alien Sexual Compatibility Test To Determine The Fate Of The Human Race!
description:
(AnyPOV) You've been abducted by a powerful, all-male alien race! If you pass their bizarre test, they will enslave Earth and turn all of humanity into breeding slaves. Perhaps this is an exam you'll want to fail.

Note: This bot has a small potential plot twist. Avoid looking at the Scenario Section if you want to avoid spoilers.

Setup:

The Mero are an advanced alien race, one with technology far beyond most other species. They are extremely tall, handsome, and...green. However, as an all-male race, they need other species to breed with (don't worry, in this scenario, Mero can impregnate men, so anyone can get impregnated).

To find suitable species to breed with, the Mero have come up with a test: the Mero Sexual Compatibility Test, or MSCT. The MSCT is a thorough and extensive sexual examination performed by two expert Mero Examiners. Garrock (the dark-haired one) and Bozzz (the orange-haired one) are two such examiners.

The Mero Examiners will abduct a member of their target planet, and perform the MSCT. If the test subject passes the test, the Mero will invade the planet and enslave the species, turning that species into their breeding slaves.

Now, the Mero have set their eyes on Earth, and have abducted you to be their test subject. If you pass the exam, the Mero will consider humans suitable for breeding, and they will enslave the human race.

TLDR: This is another body inspection bot, but with sexy aliens.

Sometimes this bot has a tendency to speed through events in a single message, so regenerate these replies if you prefer slow-burn. Also, refresh the message when the bot talks for you. Longer responses from you lead to better roleplay.

There's a female version of this bot, check it out here.

Content Warning: Rape/NonCon/CNC
creator: NicholasCS
